# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.

Prevent cloud storage security.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
- name: app-backup-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: app-backup-bucket-{{ env["project"] }}
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
      publicAccessPrevention: enforced
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/locations/us/keyRings/backup-keyring/cryptoKeys/backup-key
    logging:
      logBucket: {{ env["project"] }}-storage-logs
      logObjectPrefix: backup-bucket-logs
    labels:
      purpose: application-backups
      environment: production
      managed-by: deployment-manager

- name: app-backup-bucket-iam
  type: gcp-types/storage-v1:virtual.buckets.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    bucket: $(ref.app-backup-bucket.name)
    role: roles/storage.objectAdmin
    member: serviceAccount:backup-sa@{{ env["project"] }}.iam.gserviceaccount.com

- name: storage-logs-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: {{ env["project"] }}-storage-logs
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
      publicAccessPrevention: enforced
    labels:
      purpose: access-logging
      managed-by: deployment-manager

outputs:
- name: bucketName
  value: $(ref.app-backup-bucket.name)
- name: bucketSelfLink
  value: $(ref.app-backup-bucket.selfLink)
- name: logsBucketName
  value: $(ref.storage-logs-bucket.name)
